creator: jhelfman@e-e.com
text:
Although this is scheduled deprecation, this bug still applies, however I
have addressed this with a patch in ports/153136 and ports/153668, and this
should be considered for closing as a duplicate.

This "patch" PR, in my opinion, is not a patch, and will break for a number
of reasons.

-jgh
